title: Come As You Are: The Surprising New Science That Will Transform Your Sex Life
subtitle: A revolutionary look at female sexuality through the lens of the dual control model and responsive desire.
author: Emily Nagoski
themes: The dual control model — sexual excitation and sexual inhibition systems
Responsive desire — desire often follows arousal, not the other way around
Context is the single most important factor in female sexuality
The orgasm gap and its psychological roots
The stress-emotion-sex connection — stress is the biggest turn-off
awards: Goodreads Choice Award for Science & Technology (nominee)
excerpt: Emily Nagoski, a sex educator with a PhD in health behavior, offers a paradigm-shifting understanding of female sexuality. Drawing on the dual control model of sexual response, she shows that women's sexuality is not broken — it is contextual. Stress, mood, body image, and relationship satisfaction matter more for sexual well-being than any biological measure. The book's message: your sexuality is normal exactly as it is.
